revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Maintenance template removal]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Maintenance template removal]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Help:Maintenance_template_removal]]
/* Specific template guidance */ simplify styles
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Help:Maintenance_template_removal]]: importing single revision from english wikipedia to provide context instead of writing an inferior article for here
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
bumping
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
dummy edit to bring up all the wikipedia articles to the top
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and categories from Wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
tagging these as blank templates
Adding [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects D]] to [[Category:Pages to be overwritten]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported
